nasb.text: “Stand in the gate of the Lord’s house and proclaim there this word and say, ‘Hear the word of the Lord, all you of Judah, who enter by these gates to worship the Lord!’ ”

esv.text: “Stand in the gate of the Lord’s house, and proclaim there this word, and say, Hear the word of the Lord, all you men of Judah who enter these gates to worship the Lord.

cnv.text: “你要站在耶和華的殿門口，在那裡宣告這話，說：‘所有進這些門來敬拜耶和華的猶大人哪！你們都要聽耶和華的話。’”

ccb.text: “你站在耶和华殿的门口这样宣告，‘从这些门进殿敬拜耶和华的犹大人啊，你们要听耶和华的话。
